race.comment: ARTIFACTX (2) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race when he did his best work late and finished 3.5 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1540m at Gold Coast Poly. Ideally placed and is sure to play a major role. PEACH GALANTES (11) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race and finished 5 lengths away in sixth last time out over 1200m at Toowoomba. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time. BRITANNIA ROSE (7) was always well out of her ground when 14 lengths from the winner in 13th over 1300m at Gold Coast last start, a less impressive effort than her sixth at Ipswich the run before. Finds a more suitable contest and can take this out. HARLEY CHARLIE (10) was beaten 2.75 lengths into fourth at the second run back from a break in a 1400m contest at Sunshine Coast Poly at his latest appearance. Best efforts measure up so worth another chance.
